rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §11.402, which governs parental grievance procedures for school district subchapter violations. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A parent of a student enrolled in a school district may seek relief for a violation of this subchapter by filing a grievance through the district's grievance procedure adopted under Section 26.011.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses school district grievance procedures, not property tax exemptions.
